faqs.question: How do I book a unit?
faqs.answer: To book a unit, browse available properties, select your desired unit, choose your check-in and check-out dates, and complete the booking process with payment.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept payments via QR code. After booking, you'll receive a QR code to scan and complete your payment securely.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: You can cancel your booking up to 48 hours before check-in for a full refund. Cancellations within 48 hours are subject to a 50% fee.

faqs.question: How do I check in?
faqs.answer: Check-in instructions will be sent to your email 24 hours before your arrival. You'll receive the unit access code and any special instructions.

faqs.question: What about security deposits?
faqs.answer: A security deposit is required for all bookings. It will be returned within 7 days after checkout if there are no damages or issues.

faqs.question: Can I modify my booking?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can modify your booking dates from your dashboard. Changes are subject to availability and may affect the total price.

faqs.question: How do I become a host?
faqs.answer: To become a host, register as a host on our platform, complete your profile, and list your property with photos and details. Our team will review and approve your listing.

faqs.question: How do I contact the host?
faqs.answer: You can message the host directly through your booking details page. The host will receive your message and respond promptly.

faqs.question: What amenities are included?
faqs.answer: Amenities vary by property. Check the unit details page for a complete list of amenities including WiFi, parking, kitchen, etc.

faqs.question: How do I leave a review?
faqs.answer: After your checkout, you'll receive a link to leave a review. You can rate your experience and provide feedback about the property.

13.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
13.answer: Check-in is from 3:00 PM onwards, and check-out is by 11:00 AM. Early check-in or late check-out can be arranged upon request with additional fees.

13.question: Is parking available?
13.answer: Yes! Free parking is available on-site. We have 2 dedicated parking spaces for guests. No reservation needed - first come, first served.

13.question: Are pets allowed?
13.answer: Sorry, pets are not allowed in this property to maintain cleanliness and accommodate guests with allergies. Service animals are welcome with proper documentation.

13.question: What amenities are included?
13.answer: Our property includes: Free WiFi, Air conditioning, Full kitchen with refrigerator and microwave, Smart TV with Netflix, Fresh linens and towels, Complimentary coffee and tea, and 24/7 security.

13.question: Is the property available for my dates?
13.answer: Let me check the current availability for you! I'll look at the booking calendar to see what dates are open.

13.question: What's the cancellation policy?
13.answer: I offer flexible cancellation: Full refund if cancelled 48+ hours before check-in. 50% refund if cancelled 24-48 hours before. No refund for same-day cancellations, except for emergencies (case by case).

13.question: How do I get the keys?
13.answer: I use a smart lock system! You'll receive the door code via SMS 2 hours before your check-in time. The code is unique to your stay and expires after checkout for security.

13.question: Is there a minimum stay requirement?
13.answer: Minimum stay is 2 nights for regular bookings. For weekends and holidays, minimum is 3 nights. Weekly stays (7+ nights) get 10% discount automatically applied!

13.question: What's nearby the property?
13.answer: Great location! 5-minute walk to downtown, 10 minutes to the beach, restaurants and cafes within 2 blocks. Grocery store across the street. Public transport stop right outside - very convenient!

13.question: Do you provide cleaning service?
13.answer: The property is professionally cleaned before each stay. For stays longer than 7 days, I provide complimentary mid-stay cleaning. Additional cleaning can be arranged for $50.

13.question: How do I make a booking?
13.answer: Booking is super easy! Just scroll down to the calendar, select your check-in and check-out dates, and click 'Book Now'. You'll get instant confirmation and receive all the details via email. Payment is secure and processed immediately.

13.question: Can I book for tonight or tomorrow?
13.answer: Yes! I accept same-day and next-day bookings if available. Just check the calendar - if the dates are green/available, you can book instantly. For same-day bookings, I'll send the access code within 1 hour of confirmation.

greetings: Hello! I'm your Smart Stay assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! Welcome to Smart Stay. What can I assist you with?
Hey! I'm here to help with your booking questions. What would you like to know?
fallback: I'm not sure I understand. Could you rephrase that?
I don't have information about that. Would you like to speak with our support team?
That's a great question! Let me connect you with a human agent for better assistance.
